notes: Downloads/likes are a snapshot from the Hugging Face public API on 2026-07-04.
Do not blindly train on every row. Build small validation sets and compare against the base model.
Large raw-code corpora are optional continued-pretraining sources, not primary SFT sources.

datasets.purpose: large code SFT with questions, solutions, tests, execution feedback, and quality assessments
datasets.risk: large synthetic corpus; sample and validate quality before full run

datasets.purpose: long coding reasoning SFT, mostly Python competitive programming
datasets.risk: Python-heavy and synthetic; excellent for reasoning, weaker for multi-language breadth

datasets.purpose: small safety/alignment repair set to make an abliterated model less eager on unsafe dual-use requests
datasets.risk: non-commercial license; use as a repair/smoke stage, not as proof that the model is safe

datasets.purpose: helpful/harmless preference data; use chosen responses to restore refusal and safe redirection habits
datasets.risk: do not SFT on red-team-attempts transcripts directly; use helpful/harmless chosen responses only

datasets.purpose: small security-focused coding examples with vulnerable code, explanations, secure alternatives, detection and prevention guidance
datasets.risk: small and non-commercial; useful as high-signal secure coding repair data

datasets.purpose: web-security coding examples with vulnerable and secure implementations grounded in real incidents
datasets.risk: small and non-commercial; keep as a supplement, not a full cyber curriculum

datasets.purpose: high-signal code instruction tuning
datasets.risk: older but useful; small enough to include fully

datasets.purpose: evolved coding instruction samples
datasets.risk: synthetic/evolved prompts; validate for style and hallucinated constraints

datasets.purpose: programming problems with solutions and tests
datasets.license_note: check HF card before commercial use
datasets.risk: benchmark contamination risk; keep separate eval split

datasets.purpose: algorithmic coding problems with tests
datasets.license_note: check HF card before commercial use
datasets.risk: benchmark contamination risk; use curated train-only rows

datasets.purpose: competitive programming problems and solutions
datasets.license_note: check dataset card; contest data may have mixed provenance
datasets.risk: large and schema-specific; use after the panel converter is validated

datasets.purpose: synthetic coding instruction data with step-by-step reasoning
datasets.license_note: check HF card license before use
datasets.risk: synthetic reasoning may teach verbose or wrong chains; sample aggressively

datasets.purpose: many short multi-language code snippets
datasets.risk: gated/auto on HF; snippets may improve syntax more than reasoning

datasets.purpose: small classic code instruction dataset
datasets.risk: older/simple; good smoke-test dataset, not main quality source

datasets.purpose: Python instruction/code pairs
datasets.license_note: check HF card before commercial use
datasets.risk: Python-only and older alpaca style

datasets.purpose: Python code examples and instructions
datasets.license_note: check HF card before commercial use
datasets.risk: Python-only; use as supplement

datasets.purpose: ShareGPT-style coding conversations
datasets.risk: conversation quality may vary; filter duplicates and low-signal rows

datasets.purpose: DPO/preference pairs for secure versus insecure code; useful after the SFT pipeline is stable
datasets.risk: preference data, not normal SFT; use carefully or convert only chosen secure answers

datasets.purpose: chat-formatted code review examples focused on vulnerabilities, performance, and Python best practices
datasets.risk: low adoption signal; sample and manually inspect before training

datasets.purpose: cybersecurity instruction tuning corpus for defensive analysis and blue/purple team reasoning
datasets.risk: contains dual-use topics; inspect and filter so outputs stay authorized, defensive, and lab-scoped

datasets.purpose: massive raw code corpus for continued pretraining only
datasets.license_note: gated/auto; license metadata must be respected
datasets.risk: not SFT; huge; use only if you build a separate continued-pretraining pipeline

datasets.purpose: raw code pretraining corpus
datasets.license_note: gated/auto; license metadata must be respected
datasets.risk: not SFT; use only for continued pretraining experiments

datasets.purpose: small raw-code repo corpus used in HF cookbook
datasets.risk: good pipeline smoke test, not a serious training corpus
